surfaces.SKILL.md:
---
name: depone
description: Depone skill entrypoint. Use when a user asks for dynamic workflows.
---
# Depone Skill Entrypoint
surfaces.agents/openai.yaml:
interface:
  display_name: "Depone"
  default_prompt: "Use $depone to design a workflow."
surfaces.README.md:
# Depone

Depone uses DWM Core and the skill is named `depone`.
surfaces.docs/dwm-branding.md:
# Depone Branding

Depone is the public product brand.
DWM Core stands for Deterministic Workflow Machine.
The Codex skill name is `depone`.
The repository slug remains `dwm`.
Do not claim autonomous execution.
